## [00:00 - 01:33]

This is the pubcast shot. I'm John Loomer and today we're gonna talk about reposting videos on TikTok. Let's go! Should you repost your videos? Let's find out. I've been skeptical of this approach but recently I had reason to try it. So first of all I wouldn't recommend doing this on Facebook or Instagram because the algorithms on those platforms prefer original content. That may not be the case on TikTok. So I published a video more than 24 hours ago and early on I realized something was wrong. I thought this video would do well but within multiple hours it only had like 40 plays on it and normally even one of my bad performing videos would at least get a couple hundred. So it seemed like this would be a good time to experiment. 11 hours later I published the exact same video file and now the next day that original file still doing really badly. The second attempt though had more than 10 times as many plays. So while this doesn't mean that posting in a second time is why it got more plays but what it does tell me is that you don't get penalized on TikTok for posting the same video multiple times. So yeah this is something to try out. Go ahead and experiment report back. Follow for more. So this shot was taken directly from a video I did on TikTok. If you're not already following me on TikTok do so at John Loomer. You can also keep following me here. Don't forget to subscribe, rate and review. Until next time, do awesome things. I'm out.
